/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/pcode-editor.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/pcode-editor.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/pcode-editor.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui_demo.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/pcode-editor.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui_draw.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/pcode-editor.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui_tables.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/pcode-editor.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui_widgets.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/pcode-editor.dir/_deps/imgui-src/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/pcode-editor.dir/_deps/imgui-src/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/pcode-editor.dir/_deps/imgui_coloredit-src/TextEditor.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/pcode-editor.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/pcode-editor.dir/src/editor_app.cpp.o" -o pcode-editor  _deps/glfw-build/src/libglfw3.a /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libGLU.so -ldl _deps/nfd-build/src/libnfd.a -lgtk-3 -lgdk-3 -lpangocairo-1.0 -lcairo-gobject -lgdk_pixbuf-2.0 -latk-1.0 -lpango-1.0 -lcairo -lharfbuzz -lgio-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -lz /usr/lib/librt.a -ldl /usr/lib/libgtk-3.so /usr/lib/libgdk-3.so /usr/lib/libpangocairo-1.0.so /usr/lib/libcairo-gobject.so /usr/lib/libgdk_pixbuf-2.0.so /usr/lib/libatk-1.0.so /usr/lib/libpango-1.0.so /usr/lib/libcairo.so /usr/lib/libharfbuzz.so /usr/lib/libgio-2.0.so /usr/lib/libgobject-2.0.so /usr/lib/libglib-2.0.so /usr/lib/libz.so /usr/lib/libwayland-client.so -lm
